name: 24 Hour Love
original_name: สัญญารัก 24 ชั่วโมง
overview: The story of Ice, a beautiful office worker who just got her heart broken, so she decided to hire a friend to travel as a girlfriend for 24 hours. But this hiring leads to an unexpected relationship.

trailers.title: [Teaser] 24 Hour Love สัญญารัก 24 ชั่วโมง
